prompt: I need to inject secrets from Infisical into my Docker containers at runtime. I'm deploying to AWS ECS. What's the best way to do this without baking secrets into the image?

assertions.text: Recommends AWS Auth as the preferred method for ECS (platform-native, zero-secret)
Uses correct CLI install URL (artifacts-cli.infisical.com, not dl.infisical.com)
Shows 'infisical run' pattern for injecting secrets at container startup
Does not recommend deprecated Service Tokens for authentication
Explicitly warns against baking secrets into Docker images
Uses machine identity authentication (not API keys or service tokens)
